Current Behavior: Adriel might move a routine card if skipping today.
New Behavior: Event-driven: Script finds today's instance. Preserves ORIGINAL TIME (routine time is sacred). Checks target day at same time. If FREE: moves instance to target day at same time. If CONFLICT: compares priority — routine ALWAYS wins at same or higher priority. P1 routine bumps any P1/P2/P3 conflict. P2 routine bumps P2/P3 conflict. P3 routine bumps P3 conflict. Only if routine is LOWER priority than conflict does routine get bumped. Bumped item goes to next free slot. Target day: same day if possible otherwise next day (daily) or preserve interval (weekly/bi-weekly). Card goes to Scheduled.
If AI Needed How and Why: Deterministic: preserve time check conflict compare priority. Routine wins at same or higher priority. Only lower priority routine gets bumped. No AI.
